strengths: Long tenure (15+ years) in software engineering across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Current title is Senior/Staff Software Engineer — no evidence of Principal, Director-level, or Distinguished IC scope
No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership in AI
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD in AI) and no evidence of cloud-platform strategy or advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and AI products
No Director-level IC or Principal-scope leadership history
Limited cloud platform strategy and customer-advisory experience

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned hands-on engineer but does not match the Principal/Director-level IC bar this role demands. The resume shows product-team contributions rather than strategic technical leadership, lacks any recognized AI expertise, published AI products, or advanced AI degree, and provides no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping the future state of cloud platforms. Recent AI exposure is limited to a few months of MCP tooling work, which is insufficient for a role centered on AI strategy and differentiation.
